title: OpenLogic Concept Schema
description: The foundational rules for defining a Unique Concept ID (UCID) in the OpenLogic-Kernel.

canonical_name.description: A precise, snake_case name for the concept (e.g., DOUGH_FERMENTATION_TEST).

domains.description: The specific field(s) where this concept applies.

logic_definition.description: A formal logic or pseudo-code expression defining the concept's boundaries.

legacy_aliases.description: Ambiguous natural language words that map to this UCID (e.g., ['proof', 'rising']).
